rag_document_qa.name: RAG-Based Document Q&A
rag_document_qa.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for answering questions against a document corpus

vectorStore.description: Semantic search index for document retrieval

dataFlow: 1. User submits query via API/UI
2. Query embedded using same model as documents
3. Vector similarity search retrieves relevant chunks
4. Retrieved context + query sent to Claude
5. Claude generates response with citations
6. Response returned to user with source references
rag_document_qa.mermaidDiagram:
graph TB
    User[User] --> API[API Gateway]
    API --> Orch[Orchestration Layer]
    Orch --> Embed[Embedding Service]
    Embed --> Vector[Vector Store]
    Vector --> Orch
    Orch --> Claude[Claude API]
    Claude --> Orch
    Orch --> API
    API --> User
    
    subgraph Ingestion
        Docs[Documents] --> Process[Processing Lambda]
        Process --> Embed2[Embedding Service]
        Embed2 --> Vector
    end
securityConsiderations: Document-level access control in vector store
Query filtering based on user permissions
Audit logging of all queries and responses
scalingConsiderations: Vector store sizing based on document corpus
LLM rate limits and quota management

conversational_agent.name: Conversational Agent with Tool Use
conversational_agent.description: Multi-turn conversational AI with ability to call external tools and APIs

llm.description: Language model with tool use capability

dataFlow: 1. User sends message
2. Retrieve conversation history from session store
3. Build context with history + available tools
4. Claude determines if tool use needed
5. If tool needed: execute tool, return result to Claude
6. Claude generates response
7. Store updated conversation state
8. Return response to user
conversational_agent.mermaidDiagram:
graph TB
    User[User] --> API[API Gateway]
    API --> Orch[Orchestration]
    Orch --> Session[Session Store]
    Orch --> Claude[Claude API]
    Claude --> |Tool Call| Tools[Tool Execution]
    Tools --> |Tool Result| Claude
    Claude --> Orch
    Orch --> Session
    Orch --> API
    API --> User
    
    subgraph External Systems
        Tools --> EHR[EHR System]
        Tools --> Scheduling[Scheduling API]
        Tools --> Claims[Claims System]
    end
securityConsiderations: Audit logging of all tool calls

batch_processing.name: Batch Processing Pipeline
batch_processing.description: Async processing of large document sets or data transformation tasks
dataFlow: 1. Job submitted with document references
2. Job queued for processing
3. Worker picks up job from queue
4. Document retrieved from storage
5. Document processed through Claude API
6. Results stored and job marked complete
7. Notification sent to requestor
batch_processing.mermaidDiagram:
graph LR
    Submit[Job Submission] --> Queue[Job Queue]
    Queue --> Worker[Worker Pool]
    Worker --> Storage[(Document Storage)]
    Worker --> Claude[Claude API]
    Claude --> Worker
    Worker --> Results[(Results Store)]
    Worker --> Notify[Notification]
    
    subgraph Monitoring
        Worker --> Metrics[Metrics]
        Worker --> Logs[Logs]
    end
scalingConsiderations: Concurrency limits based on API quotas
Dead letter queue for failed jobs

human_in_the_loop.name: Human-in-the-Loop Review System
human_in_the_loop.description: AI-assisted processing with mandatory human review and approval

decisionStore.description: Audit trail of decisions and rationale

dataFlow: 1. Case submitted for processing
2. AI analyzes case and generates recommendation
3. Case queued for human review with AI summary
4. Reviewer examines case and AI recommendation
5. Reviewer approves, modifies, or rejects
6. Decision recorded with full audit trail
7. Outcome communicated to requestor
human_in_the_loop.mermaidDiagram:
graph TB
    Case[Case Submission] --> AI[AI Processing]
    AI --> |Recommendation| Queue[Review Queue]
    Queue --> UI[Review Interface]
    UI --> Reviewer[Human Reviewer]
    Reviewer --> |Decision| Store[(Decision Store)]
    Store --> Notify[Notification]
    
    subgraph Audit Trail
        AI --> Audit[(Audit Log)]
        Reviewer --> Audit
    end
securityConsiderations: Complete audit trail of all actions

patternSelection.guidance: Select pattern based on primary use case characteristics

choose_when: Primary need is answering questions from existing documents
Users need citations and source references
Building trust in new AI systems
